text: - [ ]  GS Mountain employees will inform their workers daily of the location of the shade structures and will be encouraged to take a five- minute cool-down rest in the shade. A worker who takes a preventative cool-down rest break will be monitored and asked if they are experiencing symptoms of heat illness. In no case will the individual be ordered back to work until signs or symptoms of heat illness have abated (see the section on Emergency Response for additional information).
